subcodes.first_line: O companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! For some time now thou hast been blessed to dwell in proximity to the Sacred Threshold and to kiss its sanctified steps [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق عبدالبهاء چندیست شما در آنجا بجوار آستان مقدس فائز و بتقبیل عتبه
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Shrines and Holy places
